title: Delegation contract gains the cli branch: a gather's stdout IS the digest
action: The Delegation contract (routing-and-contracts.md, 'Transport' line ~201) names exactly two transports — a `model` param and an anchored [bee-tier: <tier>] marker — and presumes an Agent/Task dispatch unconditionally. Every skill's gather step cites it, and so does every plain-conversation fan-out where no skill routes at all; AGENTS.block.md says 'Gathers default to the generation tier'. So when `generation` resolves to {kind:'cli', command} the most-travelled path in bee is UNDEFINED. Add the third branch: resolve the tier with resolveTier(root, tier, runtime); when it returns type==='cli', the gather does NOT go through Agent/Task at all — run the configured command via Bash, prompt on stdin, and TREAT STDOUT AS THE DIGEST. State the three things that make this safe and cheap: (1) a gather is READ-ONLY, so it needs no cell, no reservation, no result.json — the artifact-acceptance apparatus exists for cell execution, not for a digest; (2) an empty or garbled digest is a FAILED gather, never a silent one — the orchestrator must notice, because probe 2 proved a cli worker will report success having done nothing; (3) cli CELL EXECUTION is a separate, still-ungated path (Slice 2A ships the gather branch only) — say so explicitly, and point at swarming-reference.md's External Executors for it. Mirror the same branch, one sentence, into AGENTS.block.md's critical rule 13 so the always-loaded layer carries it too (critical pattern 20260713: a standing order and the minimum mechanics to obey it must travel together).

truths: resolveTier(...).type === 'cli' is a first-class transport in the shared Delegation contract, not a bee-swarming-only concept
A cli gather runs via Bash with the prompt on stdin; its stdout is the digest
A read-only gather needs no cell, no reservation and no result.json
An empty or garbled digest is a failed gather, surfaced — never accepted as an empty answer
cli CELL EXECUTION remains out of scope here and is explicitly marked as such
prohibitions: Do NOT make a cli gather write a result.json — that is the cell-execution contract, and importing it here would be ceremony with no artifact to accept
Do NOT claim cli cell execution works; probe 3 proved it does not under a sandboxing CLI
Do NOT touch the anchored-marker forgery rules (decision 0023)

verify: cd /home/thanhsmind/projects/goglbe/beegog && grep -qiF "type === 'cli'" skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md && grep -qiF 'stdout' skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md && grep -qiF 'cli' skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md && echo DELEGATION_OK
